method_summary: Zero-shot learning approach with two levels of independent queries, including chain-of-thought prompting, to evaluate LLM chatbots on Alzheimer's dementia detection from spontaneous speech recordings.
key_innovation: Evaluation of ChatGPT and Bard for Alzheimer's dementia detection using zero-shot learning with chain-of-thought prompting
datasets_used: spontaneous speech recordings (dataset not explicitly named)
best_result: Bard achieved 89% recall and 71% F1 score for AD detection
limitations_stated: LLM chatbots do not currently satisfy clinical application for Alzheimer's detection
title: Performance Assessment of ChatGPT vs Bard in Detecting Alzheimer's Dementia
